name: Ransomware File Activity
description: Detects rapid file modifications and deletions consistent with ransomware behavior
query:
// Ransomware Detection
// Mass file modifications/deletions in short time
events from endpoint
where event_type in ("file_modify", "file_delete", "file_rename")
  and file_extension in ("encrypted", "locked", "crypto", "enc")
group by hostname, username
having count(*) > 100
within 60 seconds
